name: BTN_UP
notes: Active-LOW; internal pull-up; 50 ms debounce in task_buttons

name: BTN_OK
notes: Active-LOW; internal pull-up; 3 s hold = fault reset

name: I2C_SDA
notes: Shared bus: SSD1306 OLED (0x3C) + DS1307 RTC

name: I2C_SCL
notes: Shared bus: SSD1306 OLED (0x3C) + DS1307 RTC

name: RELAY_FAN
notes: LEDC PWM with INVERTED duty (100% speed = pin LOW); not a plain relay drive

name: RELAY_PUMP
notes: WARNING strapping pin MTDI (BUG-004): external pull-up at reset can brick boot; relocate to 16/17/19/23 or burn flash-voltage eFuse

name: RELAY_TURNER
notes: WARNING strapping pin MTDO (BUG-004): verify boot with relay board attached; candidate for relocation

name: GPIO16
notes: Safe on WROOM (reserved for PSRAM on WROVER); preferred relocation target for pump/turner

name: GPIO17
notes: Safe on WROOM (reserved for PSRAM on WROVER); preferred relocation target for pump/turner

name: GPIO5
notes: Usable but a strapping pin (SDIO timing); boots HIGH - avoid for fail-ON loads

name: GPIO34
notes: No pull-ups; ADC capable (candidate: water-level sensor)

name: GPIO1
notes: Serial TX0 (USB logging) - do not reuse

name: GPIO3
notes: Serial RX0 (USB logging) - do not reuse

name: GPIO0
notes: Must be HIGH at reset (boot mode); onboard BOOT button on devkits

name: GPIO2
notes: Must be LOW/floating at reset for flashing; onboard LED on many devkits
